backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a clothing store backend with product, cart, and order types, plus initialization of sample products across four categories (female dresses, male shirts, male t-shirts, kids apparel) using stable Maps.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that the male-shirts-cover image asset and its reference in `frontend/src/lib/utils.ts` were updated to fix the category image mapping.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-to-two sentence summaries of every frontend source file, serving as a build-planning reference for the project's React/TanStack frontend.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS color tokens for light and dark modes using a neutral (zero-chroma) palette, plus sidebar and chart color variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that sets the page title to 'DHIMAYU STUDIO' and mounts the React app via `src/main.tsx`.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Configures TanStack Router with seven routes (home, catalog, product detail, cart, checkout, order confirmation, admin) all nested under the Layout root route.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Three-column footer displaying the dhimayu-logo-black image, collection and studio link lists, copyright notice, and a caffeine.ai attribution badge.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header with a centered logo and studio name, desktop category navigation buttons, an Admin link, a cart icon with item count badge, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Shell layout component that wraps all pages with Header, a flex-growing Outlet, and Footer.
frontend/src/components/ProductCard.tsx: Renders a product card with image, name, price, and sizes, including a hover-triggered quick-add-to-cart button that calls the addToCart mutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated) using React Query, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing Internet Identity authentication state, login, and logout via AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines all React Query hooks for products, cart, and orders, including queries and mutations (add, update, delete) that interact with the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Google Fonts and defining Tailwind CSS custom design tokens (colors, typography) for the Dhimayu Studio warm neutral palette in light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Utility functions and constants including class merging (cn), INR price formatting, and category label/slug/image mappings.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/Admin.tsx: Admin page for managing products with a table view and dialogs for adding, editing, and deleting products, including client-side image compression before upload.
frontend/src/pages/Cart.tsx: Renders the shopping cart page with a list of cart items, quantity controls (increment/decrement/remove), and an order summary with subtotal and checkout navigation.
frontend/src/pages/Catalog.tsx: Displays a product catalog page filtered by category, with category tab navigation, loading skeletons, error/empty states, and a responsive product grid.
frontend/src/pages/Checkout.tsx: Provides a checkout form for customer name and delivery address, displays an order summary with line items and subtotal, and handles order placement with validation.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Renders the homepage with a hero image, brand statement section, and a grid of category cards that navigate to the catalog; also auto-initializes the store if no products exist.
frontend/src/pages/OrderConfirmation.tsx: Shows a post-order confirmation page with a success icon, order reference ID from URL search params, and links to return home or continue shopping.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetail.tsx: Displays a single product's detail page with image, size selector, add-to-cart functionality, stock status, and loading/error states.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Cormorant Garamond, Jost), OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, keyframe animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animate.
project_state.json: Tracks project state at version 3, recording a known issue where the Male Shirts category cover displays the logo instead of a product image, and defines a fix feature to save the correct photo as a static asset and update its reference in utils.ts.
